transactions.desc: Atlanta signed Gomber to a minor-league contract Saturday and assigned the 32-year-old southpaw to Triple-A Gwinnett, per MLB's transaction log.
The Rangers granted Gomber's release from Triple-A Round Rock on Saturday, Jeff Wilson of AllDLLS.com reports.
The Giants optioned Beck to Triple-A Sacramento on Saturday.
The Giants reinstated Miller (back) from the injured list Saturday.
The Giants recalled Brennan from Triple-A Sacramento on Saturday.
The Angels optioned Teodosio to Triple-A Salt Lake on Saturday.
The Angels selected Siri's contract from Triple-A Salt Lake on Saturday.
The Cubs reinstated Wicks (elbow) from the injured list Saturday and optioned him to Triple-A Iowa, Taylor McGregor of Marquee Sports Network reports.
The Brewers selected Strzelecki's contract from Triple-A Nashville on Saturday.
The Brewers optioned Crow to Triple-A Nashville on Saturday.
The Mets recalled Gerber from Triple-A Syracuse on Saturday.
The Chicago White Sox traded LHP Jackson Nove to the  Athletics.
The  Athletics traded OF Junior Perez to the Chicago White Sox.
The  Athletics traded RHP Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates.
The Pittsburgh Pirates traded INF Alika Williams to the  Athletics.
The Yankees recalled Rodriguez from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Saturday.
The Athletics designated Stefanic for assignment Saturday.
The Tigers optioned Hanifee to Triple-A Toledo on Saturday.
The Tigers reinstated Mize (thigh) from the injured list Saturday.
The White Sox recalled Eisert from Triple-A Charlotte on Saturday.
The White Sox optioned Schweitzer to Triple-A Charlotte on Saturday.
The Red Sox recalled Sogard from Triple-A Worcester on Saturday, Tim Healey of The Boston Globe reports.
The Cardinals designated Shuster for assignment Saturday, Jeff Jones of the Belleville News-Democrat reports.
The Cardinals reinstated Pushard (knee) from the injured list Saturday, Jeff Jones of the Belleville News-Democrat reports.
The Royals reinstated Falter (elbow) from the injured list Saturday.
The Dodgers recalled Barnes from Triple-A Oklahoma City on Friday, Maddie Lee of the Los Angeles Times reports.
The Giants optioned Koss to Triple-A Sacramento on Friday.
The Giants activated Susac (elbow) from the 10-day injured list Friday.
The Athletics traded RHP Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles.
The Athletics optioned Barnett to Triple-A Las Vegas on Friday.
